documentation.description: A single parameter in a MIME type, separated from the base type with ";"

record_types.name: MIME_Type
record_types.code:
type MIME_Type is record
		General : Unbounded_String; -- "image
		Specific : Unbounded_String; -- "svg
		Suffix : Unbounded_String; -- "xml
		-- Parameters
		-- Parameters
		Parameters : Vector;
	end record;

record_types.name: Parameter

generic_instantiations.name: Parameter_Vectors
generic_instantiations.code:
package Parameter_Vectors is new Ada.Containers.Vectors
		(Index_Type => Positive, Element_Type => Parameter);
